titleStmt.title: SII 27.159: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 159. (A.R. No. 841 of 1929-30.) BAINDŪRU, COONDAPOOR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab lying by the side of the tank called Hosakere near the Śayanēśvara temple.
This record is dated Śaka 1429 (expired), 1430 (current), Vibhava, Kārttika, śu. 1, corresponding to 1508 A.D., October 25. The details are not verifiable.

It registers a gift, by purchase, of lands by Duggaṇa-seṭi of the family of Kōṭi Tammiseṭṭi for feeding six brāhmaṇas daily in the maṭha built by him. It gives details of land purchased by him from several individuals in the year Kshaya (1506-07 A.D.), when mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Yindagarasa-voḍeya, son of Saṅgirāya-voḍeya was governing Hāḍuvaḷḷiya-rājya. At the time of the grant Basavarasavoḍeya was governing Bārakūru-rājya under the orders of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayēṁ nama[ḥ .*] śrī sarasvatyāyēṁ nama[ḥ .*] śrī gurubhyōṁ nama[ḥ .*] nirvighnamastu . namastuṁ
ga śirastuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē trayilōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē svastiśrī ja
yābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruśa 1429 saṁdu sāvirada nānūṟu mūvattu saluva vibhava samvatsarada kā
rttika śu 1 lū śrī maṁnmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa yiṁmaḍi bhujabala narasiṁga dēvarāya
mahārāyaru vijayanagariya siṁhāsanadali sukhasaṁkathā vinōda krīḍeyiṁda samasta varnadharṁmana śra
maṁgaḷanū pratipālisutiha kāladalū Ā narasiṁha dēvarāya mahārāyara nirūpadiṁda ke
ṁkada basavarasa Oḍeyaru bārakūra rājyakke bijeyamāḍi bārakūra rājyada dēvadāya braṁhmadāyaga
ḷanū salaha duṣṭanigraha śiṣṭapratipālaneyanu māḍi dharṁmmava hiḍidu Adharṁmmava biḍuva kāladalli bayi
dūra jōrajara baḷiya kōṭi tammiseṭṭiyara kuṭuṁbada duggaṇaseṭṭi maṭhavakaṭṭi dhaṁmavamāḍistaṁthāma
ṭhakepratidina voṁdakaṁ Uṁba brāṁhmara ja 6 ralkedalū Ācaṁdrārkkastāyiyāgi naḍavaṁthā dhaḥmmakke dhaṁma .
da Akiya bāḷa vivaragaḷa barasida śilāśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare . śrī maṁnmahāmaṁḍaḷēsvara saṁgirāyavoḍe
yaragomāra yiṁdagarsavoḍeyaru hāḍavaḷiya rājyavanu pratipālisuva kāladalli bayidūra jō
rajara baḷiya dugaṇa seṭi taṁnamaṭhake biḍibāḷina vivara kṣayasaṁvatsarada kritikeya kāladalu
śrīmatu Aṁṇiseṭiyaramaga duggaṇaseṭiyaru beṁmmakkaseṭitiya moṁmakaḷu nāraṇa bhaṁḍāri
Avana kiṟiyatāyi beṁmaka seṭitiyavaru yi kartara kayyalu nānumudaṇakāḍaloḷage muḷakaḍe
gaḍiya mūlavakoṁḍu nānu mūlavāgi Āḷutaṁvida muḷakaḍe gadeya gaḍiya vivara mūḍalu gaṁṭe
seṭi bāḷuva gaddeya Aṁcugaḍi teṁkalu hariharaseṭiya Agara kaṁṭhara sōvaṇaseṭiya kesu bā
ḷuva bāḷida Aṁcugaḍi paḍuvalu gōpuseṭiti bāḷuvagadeya Aṁcugaḍi baḍagalu bāḷādiya
beṁmaṇaseṭiya bāḷa Aṁcugaḍiyiṁti nālku gaḍiyiṁdoḷaguḷa gaddekoḍege saha Eraḍu
bittaṇakke bījavari hā 40 U mu 4 Akṣāradalu nālkumuḍi gadeyanu nāraṇabhaṁḍāri beṁmakka
seṭiti yivaru yi kartarakayyalu Arthaparitsēdavāgi koṭu mūlatsēdavāgi koṁḍu hiraṁ
ṇyōdaka dhārāpūrvavāgi Eṟiyisikoṁḍu yi nālku muḍigadeyanu dharṁmakebiṭu yi bāḷige
kaṭidagēṇi Aki kaṁci hā 40 U rmu Akṣaradalu voṁbhattu muḍi Aki bhūmi caṁdrāṁrkastāyi
yāgi naḍadu baharu yiṁtappudakke sākṣigaḷu kalige nirigoppuva varu jaṁni vidyanāradēvagaḷu ba
yala tiruma seṭṭiya mācuseṭṭi sēnēśvara dēvaru hariseṭṭi nāraṇaseṭṭi kartaravoppa kuḷa
gēriya nāgaru baṁharu sākṣigaḷavoppa kaṁcaladēvi kṣaya saṁvatsarada krittikeya kā
ladali Aṁṇiseṭṭiyara maga dugaṇaseṭṭi saṁkurācana Aḷiya siriyaṁma beṁmaṇa seṭṭiya
vīru seṭṭiya kartara kayyalu mūlava koṁḍu mūlakaṭṭina patrada kramaveṁteṁdare kalasaṁkaṭa
vottina bāḷinge gaḍi mūḍalu haridatōḍu gaḍitenkalu jayisara kōṇeyaṁṇaseṭiya makka
ḷu bāḷuva bāḷu gaḍi paḍuvalu kuṁdala braṁharabāḷugaḍi baḍagalu kōṭiyaṇa seṭiya ma
kkaḷu bāḷugaḍi yiṁtī nālku gaḍiyiṁdoḷaguḷa hā 70 gade mattaṁ mariya gadege gaḍi
mūḍalu liruvamane gaḍiteṁkalu paḍuvalu mābuseṭṭiya bāḷugaḍi ba
ḍagalu vīraseṭiya vīruseṭiya bāḷugaḍi yiṁtī nālkugaḍiyiṁdoḷagaṇa bāḷu
mu 10 ne Aṁtu bitaṇake bījavari saha 40 U mu 2 . yeraḍuvare muḍi gade yivara kayya
mūlavakoṁḍu Arththaparitsēdavāgi koṭu mūlaparitsēdavāgi koṁḍu dhārāpūrvakavāgi
yerayisikoṁḍu bhūmi caṁdrārkkasthāyiyāgi maṭhakke biṭa bāḷige kaṭidagēṇi Akki
kaṁci hā 40 U mu 3 mūṟuvare muḍi yiṁtahudake kalige nirivoppuva sā
kṣi kartara vopa tiyagōḷiya nāgaru braṁharu sākṣigaḷavoppa kaṁcaladēvi
yeḍatoṟeya Aṁṇamarasaru dugaṇaseṭiyu goramaya yicaṇa hebārana
kartara kayyalu kallāgarava mūlada koṁḍu nāu yi kartaru mūlavāgi Aḷutaṁvi .
da Agarakegaḍi mūḍalu guḷapenāyana Agaradabāḷu gaḍi teṁkalu hāḷegaḍi paḍu
valu baḍagalu sēnaśvaradēvara dēvasvada bāḷu gaḍiyiṁtī nālku gaḍiyiṁ doḷaguḷa Agarada
teṁginatōṭasaha sarahāla nuḷiye nanage baṁdabhāgi Agara teṁ
gina tōṭavanu maṭhada dharmake biṭadu yidake kaṭṭidagēṇiya Akki kaṁcina hā 40
lu mu 20 yipatu muḍi Akki bhūmi caṁdrārkastāyiyāgi naḍadu bahadu
śrīmatu dugaṇaseṭiyaru joradūra baḷiya Aṁṇukacana kayalu Āta Ā baya .
loḷage Arthaparitsēdavāgi koṭu mūlaparitsēdavāgikoṁḍu mūlavāgi Āḷutta
ṁvidagadege gaḍi mūḍalu teṁkalu caturmukhasvāmigaḷa bāḷugaḍi paḍuvalu ha
rivahaḷa gaḍi baḍagalu sēnēśvaradēvara dēvasvagaḍi yiṁtī nālku gaḍiyiṁdoḷagaṇa bā
ḷu hā 30 ge kaṭida gēṇi Akikaṁci hā 40 lu mu 3 mūṟu muḍi Aki ma .
ṭhada dharmake biṭṭibāḷu . śrīmatu dugaṇaseṭi koṁḍu holeya baḷiya ceḷike
taṁma seṭiya kayalu Ā Ālabayaloḷage Arthaparitsēdavāgi koṭumūla pari
tsēdavāgi koṁḍu mūlavāgi Āḷutaṁvida gadege gaḍi mūḍalu taṇakeya be
ṁmaseṭiya Aḷiyagaṇapana maṁḍi kumarana bāḷina Aṁcugaḍi teṁkalu
gōviṁdahebāra saṁkara diṁmiya Agaradaka kagaḍi paḍuvalu bōḷu
sāvaṁtana sōmaṇaseṭṭi Āḷutaṁvida bāḷugaḍi baḍagalu kuṁbhāara
hadavoḷagāgi kuṁdalagude gaḍiyiṁtī nālku gaḍiyiṁdoḷage bitaṇake bī
javarisaha hā 40 lu mu 2[¢]yeraḍuvare muḍi gadege kaṭida gēṇi Aki
kaṁci hā 40 lu mu 5 Ayidamuḍi Aki bhūmi caṁdrārkastā
yiyāgi maṭhake naḍadu bahudu kaṁcihā 40 lu mu 41 Akṣaradalu
nālvattavoṁdu muḍi Akiya voḷage Agaradagēṇi Akiya
hattu muḍi vuḷiye mēleyipattu voṁdumuḍi Akiyabā
ḷaterege biṭi bāḷina vivara śrīmatu dugaṇaseṭiyaru gāvaṇi
baḷiyavara kayyali mūlavakoṁḍu bāḷuttaṁvida kalasaṁda
da mūḍalagade ha 40 gadege kaṭidagēṇi kaṁcina ha 40 mu 2 saḷe
lavoḷage cikaṇana pālisoḷage gade ha 50 gadege kaṭida gēṇi kaṁ
cina ha 40 mu 2¢ A gadege gaḍi mūḍalu gōpinātha dēvara dēva
svagaḍi baḍagalu dugaṇaseṭiyaru bāḷuva bāḷugaḍi yiṁtī nā
lku gaḍiya voḷagaṇa gade ha 50 Ubhayaṁ vu 2 . gadege gēṇi
Aki mu 5 yi Ayidu muḍi Akiya bāḷateṟige Aṁtu maṭhake bi
ṭṭadu Aki kaṁcina ha 40 Akimu 47 dharmake Akkimu 40 ralu
mu 6 maṭada AḷiU pēkṣiya migisu mu 1 Aṁtu mu 40 ralu
gēriya voḷage kalagadege gaḍi mūḍalu hariva haḷa gaḍiteṁkalubaṁ
kēsvara dēvara dēvasvagaḍi paḍuvalu baliya bāḷugaḍi baḍagalu ti
rumaseṭṭiya gaḍi dugaṇaseṭi tanage baṁdaṁthā Ardhada
voḷage voṁduvare muḍi Akiyanu dugaṇaseṭi taṁnamaṭake biṭṭadharma .
dana pālanaṁ mmadhyē dānacaiyēṁ nrupālanaṁ . dānasvargamavāpnōti pālana da
svastiśrī daccutaṁpadaṁ . yidharmake Ārobbaru Aḷidavaru vāraṇāsiyali nūṟoṁdu kavileya
koṁdapāpa si bara barahaThe last two
Digital edition of SII 27.159 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
